shared.noConversation: no active agent convo ID in ctx.
shared.dynamicToolActivationDisabled: dynamic tool activation is disabled in settings. an admin can enable it in Settings → Agent Defaults.
shared.invalidToolsArray: 'tools' must b a non-empty array of tool names or domain prefixes.
shared.searchActionNudgeDisabled: IMPORTANT: some discovered tools r NOT currently enabled (isEnabled: false). u MUST call enable_tools w/ the tool names u need b4 u can use them. after enabling, tools become avail on ur next iteration.

enable_tools.noValidTools: none of the requested entries resolved 2 valid tool names. check spelling or use search_tools 2 discover avail tools.
enable_tools.alreadyEnabled: all requested tools r already enabled & avail — u can call them directly rn.
enable_tools.activated: activated {{count}} tool(s). they'll b avail on the next iteration.

disable_tools.noneInSet: none of the requested tools were in the active set.
disable_tools.protectedSuffix: {{count}} core tool(s) were protected & can't b disabled.

discover_and_enable_tools.noQueryOrDomain: at least 1 of 'query' or 'domain' is required.
discover_and_enable_tools.foundAndEnabled: found {{matchCount}} tool(s) & auto-enabled {{enabledCount}}. they're avail on the next iteration — call them directly.
discover_and_enable_tools.foundAlreadyEnabled: found {{matchCount}} tool(s), all were already enabled — call them directly.

set_timer.noConversation: no active agent session / convo ID in ctx.
set_timer.invalidDuration: 'durationSeconds' must b between {{min}} & {{max}} seconds. 4 longer scheduled reminders or recurring events, use create_cron_job instead.

list_timers.noConversation: no active agent session / convo ID in ctx.

cancel_timer.notFound: no active timer found w/ ID {{timerId}}.

enter_worktree.noConversation: no agent convo — worktree isolation requires an active convo
enter_worktree.alreadyInWorktree: already in a worktree (branch: {{branch}}). call exit_worktree 1st.
enter_worktree.success: now working in isolated worktree. all file ops r redirected 2 {{path}}. call exit_worktree w/ action 'merge' or 'discard' when done.

exit_worktree.notInWorktree: not currently in a worktree. call enter_worktree 1st.
exit_worktree.mergeFailed: merge failed: {{error}}. worktree preserved at {{path}}. resolve conflicts & try again, or exit_worktree w/ action 'discard'.
exit_worktree.merged: changes from {{branch}} merged into main branch. workspace restored.
exit_worktree.discarded: worktree {{branch}} discarded. all changes removed. workspace restored.

search_conversations.noEmbeddings: no convos w/ embeddings found. convos r auto-embedded after agent sessions w/ 6+ msgs.

summarize_conversation.summaryRequired: 'summary' is required & must b a non-empty string

ask_user.questionsRequired: the 'questions' array is required & must not b empty
ask_user.invalidQuestion: ea question in the 'questions' array must have a non-empty 'question' string
ask_user.noConversation: no convo — ask_user_question requires an active convo
ask_user.timedOut: the user did not respond within 5 min.

authenticate_mcp_server.noCredentials: at least 1 of 'token', 'api_key', or 'env' must b provided

write_todo.invalidItems: 'items' must b an array of todo objs
